description: Pegasus API contract. Jason owns this file. If you need a field, tell Jason.

stimulus.tribe_expected_engagement: number (0-1), TRIBE v2 predicted engagement for a healthy brain
stimulus.content: string, the stimulus text shown to the user
stimulus.prompt: string, instruction for how the user should respond

user_response.error_rate: number (0-100, percent of keystrokes that were backspaces)

burnout_result.source: tribe|fallback (tribe = scored by ML service, fallback = backend heuristic when ML offline)

backend (8001, owner: jason).POST /response/submit: { user_id, stimulus_id, response_text, response_time_ms, typing_wpm, error_rate } -> burnout_result

signals (8002, owner: dhruva).POST /analyze: { user_id, response_text, response_time_ms, typing_wpm, error_rate } -> { sentiment_score, energy_level, linguistic_flags, combined_signal_score, detail }
signals (8002, owner: dhruva).POST /alert: { user_id, phone, score, level, intervention } -> { sent, message_sid }

notes: stimulus shape mirrors signals/stimuli/bank.py (the live source of truth for stimuli). shared/stimuli.json is the canonical manifest the backend serves.
